---
title: "02 More on Objects"
---

## Contents

1. [Inheritance](01 Inheritance.qmd)

2. [Abstraction and Modularization](02 Abstraction and Modularization.qmd)

3. [Polymorphism](03 Polymorphism.qmd)

4. [Multiple Inheritance](04 Multiple Inheritance.qmd)

5. [Abstract Methods](05 Abstract Methods.qmd)

6. [Abstract Classes](06 Abstract Classes.qmd)

7. [Coupling and Cohesion](07 Coupling and Cohesion.qmd)
